title: SNE adherence gating and electronic-notification delivery lifecycle
statement: SNE transactional endpoints enforce adherence and the delivery lifecycle. Rules SNE.S001–S005: a non-adherent agency yields 402 SNE.AGENCY.NOT_ADHERED (S001); a non-adherent recipient (vehicle/citizen) yields 402 SNE.NOT_ADHERED (S002); a dataNotificacao more than 30 days after dataInfracao yields 402 SNE.NOTICE.DEADLINE_EXPIRED (S003, deterministic: body date vs derived deadline, never wall clock); a second notice for the same (numeroAit, tipoNotificacao) without an Idempotency-Key, or a cancellation of a terminal notice, yields 402 SNE.NOTIFICATION.INVALID_STATUS (S004); an unknown protocolo yields 404 SNE.NOTIFICATION.NOT_FOUND (S005). Delivery situação is ACEITA unless the channel is INDISPONIVEL (PENDENTE). Writes are idempotent and audited per INV-IDEMP-001.
rationale: SNE is the national electronic-notification base. The mock must gate delivery on adherence and the legal deadline exactly like the real system so pec/teat can exercise the accepted/pending/rejected/expired branches deterministically without real data.
